sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Simplicius</hi> Philosophus [Simp.] <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael. = in Aristotelis de Caelo commentaria,</title_> ed. J. L. Heiberg (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> vii), Berlin 1894. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cat. = in Aristotelis Categorias commentarium,</title_> ed. C. Kalbfleisch (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> viii), Berlin 1907. <title_ TEIform="title">in de An. = in libros Aristotelis de Anima commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Hay- duck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xi), Berlin 1882. <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict. = in Epictetum commentaria,</title_> ed. F. Dübner (post Theo- phrasti Characteras), Paris (D.) 1840. <title_ TEIform="title">in Ph. = in Aristotelis Physica commentaria,</title_> ed. H. Diels (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> ix and x), Berlin 1882-95.</item>
